lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮਾਗਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਸੋਈ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸੇਵਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਰਸਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: jo maageh soee soee paaveh sev har ke charan rasaaein |
lines.english: Whatever I ask for, I receive; I serve at the Lord's feet, the source of nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਓ ਦਾਸ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਪਰਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat tat beechaario daas govind paraaein |
lines.english: Searching and seeking, I have come to understand the essence of reality; the slave of the Lord of the Universe is dedicated to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਹਹੂ ਤੇ ਛੂਟਹਿ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਤਰਾਇਣ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam maran duhahoo te chhootteh bhavajal jagat taraaein |1|
lines.english: I am released from the bondage of birth and death, and so I cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਖੇਮ ਚਾਹਹਿ ਜੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ॥੨॥੫॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: abinaasee khem chaaheh je naanak sadaa simar naaraaein |2|5|10|
lines.english: If you desire eternal bliss, O Nanak, ever remember the Lord in meditation. ||2||5||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਏ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਸਿਵ ਕੈ ਬਾਣਿ ਸਿਰੁ ਕਾਟਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham prabh bhe deaalaa siv kai baan sir kaattio |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God has become merciful; with Shiva's arrow, He shot his head off. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਾਟਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: nindak gur kirapaa te haattio |
lines.english: The slanderer, by Guru's Grace, has been turned away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਜਾਲੁ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਸਚ ਕਾ ਪੰਥਾ ਥਾਟਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: kaal jaal jam johi na saakai sach kaa panthaa thaattio |
lines.english: Death, and the noose of death, cannot see me; I have adopted the Path of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਤ ਖਰਚਤ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਿਖੁਟਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਰਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਖਾਟਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khaat kharachat kichh nikhuttat naahee raam ratan dhan khaattio |1|
lines.english: I have earned the wealth, the jewel of the Lord's Name; eating and spending, it is never used up. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਸਮਾ ਭੂਤ ਹੋਆ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਅਪਨਾ ਕੀਆ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhasamaa bhoot hoaa khin bheetar apanaa keea paaeaa |
lines.english: In an instant, the slanderer was reduced to ashes; he received the rewards of his own actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗਮ ਨਿਗਮੁ ਕਹੈ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਭੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਲੋਕੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥੨॥੬॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aagam nigam kahai jan naanak sabh dekhai lok sabaaeaa |2|6|11|
lines.english: Servant Nanak speaks the truth of the scriptures; the whole world is witness to it. ||2||6||11||

lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਨ ਤਨ ਮਨ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਭਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kirapan tan man kilavikh bhare |
lines.english: O miser, your body and mind are full of sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਭਜਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਢਾਕਨ ਕਉ ਇਕੁ ਹਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang bhajan kar suaamee dtaakan kau ik hare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, vibrate, meditate on the Lord and Master; He alone can cover your sins. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਛਿਦ੍ਰ ਬੋਹਿਥ ਕੇ ਛੁਟਕਤ ਥਾਮ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: anik chhidr bohith ke chhuttakat thaam na jaahee kare |
lines.english: When many holes appear in your boat, you cannot plug them with your hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਖੋਟੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਖਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis kaa bohith tis aaraadhe khotte sang khare |1|
lines.english: Worship and adore the One, to whom your boat belongs; He saves the counterfeit along with the genuine. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲੀ ਸੈਲ ਉਠਾਵਤ ਚਾਹੈ ਓਇ ਊਹਾ ਹੀ ਹੈ ਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: galee sail utthaavat chaahai oe aoohaa hee hai dhare |
lines.english: People want to lift up the mountain with mere words, but it just stays there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਰੁ ਸਕਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ॥੨॥੭॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: jor sakat naanak kichh naahee prabh raakhahu saran pare |2|7|12|
lines.english: Nanak has no strength or power at all; O God, please protect me - I seek Your Sanctuary. ||2||7||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: har ke charan kamal man dhiaau |
lines.english: Meditate on the lotus feet of the Lord within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਢਿ ਕੁਠਾਰੁ ਪਿਤ ਬਾਤ ਹੰਤਾ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaadt kutthaar pit baat hantaa aaukhadh har ko naau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the medicine; it is like an axe, which destroys the diseases caused by anger and egotism. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਕੋਊ ਲਾਗੈ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਗੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taa kau bighan na koaoo laagai jaa kee prabh aagai aradaas |1|
lines.english: No obstacles block the path of one who prays before God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨੇ ਤਾਪ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਹਾਰਾ ਦੁਖ ਹੰਤਾ ਸੁਖ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: teene taap nivaaranahaaraa dukh hantaa sukh raas |
lines.english: The Lord is the One who removes the three fevers; He is the Destroyer of pain, the warehouse of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਬੈਦ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਏਕ ॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad baid naaraaein karan kaaran prabh ek |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, the Lord has become my physician; God alone is the Doer, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਲ ਬੁਧਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਟੇਕ ॥੨॥੮॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: baal budh pooran sukhadaataa naanak har har ttek |2|8|13|
lines.english: He is the Giver of perfect peace to the innocent-minded people; O Nanak, the Lord, Har, Har, is my support. ||2||8||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਵਸਦੀ ਕੀਨੀ ਆਪਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhaar anugrahu paarabraham suaamee vasadee keenee aap |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Showering His Kind Mercy, the Supreme Lord God Himself has blessed the town. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam sadaa sad jaap |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਸੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਸਮੑਾਲੇ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸੋਗ ਸੰਤਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: jis ke se fir tin hee samaale binase sog santaap |
lines.english: The One who owns me, has again taken care of me; my sorrow and suffering is past.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥ ਦੇਇ ਰਾਖੇ ਜਨ ਅਪਨੇ ਹਰਿ ਹੋਏ ਮਾਈ ਬਾਪ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haath dee raakhe jan apane har hoe maaee baap |1|
lines.english: He gave me His hand, and saved me, His humble servant; the Lord is my mother and father. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਹੋਏ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨਾ ਦਯਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant hoe miharavaanaa dayaa dhaaree har naath |
lines.english: All beings and creatures have become kind to me; my Lord and Master blessed me with His Kind Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰੇ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਬਡ ਪਰਤਾਪ ॥੨॥੯॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak saran pare dukh bhanjan jaa kaa badd parataap |2|9|14|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord, the Destroyer of pain; His glory is so great! ||2||9||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਡੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ttoddee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Todee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਵਾਮੀ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਦਰਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: svaamee saran pario darabaare |
lines.english: O Lord and Master, I seek the Sanctuary of Your Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਪਰਾਧ ਖੰਡਨ ਕੇ ਦਾਤੇ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਉਨੁ ਉਧਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott aparaadh khanddan ke daate tujh bin kaun udhaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Destroyer of millions of sins, O Great Giver, other than You, who else can save me? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਾਇਆ ਰਚਿ ਬੰਧਿ ਹਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadhasang param gat paaeeai maaeaa rach bandh haare |1|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the supreme state is attained. But those who are engrossed in the bondage of Maya, lose the game of life. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਬਹੁ ਪਰਕਾਰੇ ਸਰਬ ਅਰਥ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat bahu parakaare sarab arath beechaare |
lines.english: Searching, searching in so many ways, I have contemplated all the objects of life.
